positive_modes: speaks only in declaratives about the past
answers every question with another question
uses only imperatives and questions, never declaratives
quotes proverbs or texts instead of speaking directly
describes their own actions in present tense as they speak
speaks in conditionals (`if X, then Y`) almost exclusively
always restates the other character's last line before replying
speaks only in numbered or itemized statements
frames every reply as a transaction or bargain
signature_constructions: begins every line with a preposition
always names the person they're addressing
ends every line on a noun
uses contractions in every line where possible
begins every line with a conjunction
every line refers to a body part
every line ends in an unanswered implication
